chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (element)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (element)|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In Japan, it is also called "{{ill|Tsuchinoe|ja|つちのえ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}" (Elder Brother of Earth). * In terms of direction, it corresponds to the [[:en:Chūō|Center]]. Regarding time, it refers to around 4 a.m., with the period from 4 a.m. to 6 a.m. known as "{{ill|Boya|ja|戊夜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boya|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boya|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}." * The character "戊" is an {{ill|ideogram|ja|象形文字|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/ideogram|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/ideogram|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=hieroglyph|WD=Q193762}} representing a weapon resembling a battle-axe.<ref>{{Citation| author=Ji Xusheng| year=2014| title=Shuowen Xinzheng| location=Taipei| publisher=Yiwen Press| isbn=978-957-520-168-5| pages=962–93|qq=}}</ref><ref>{{Citation| author=Ge Liang| year=2022| title=Rediscovery of Chinese Characters| location=Shanghai| publisher=Shanghai Calligraphy and Painting Press| isbn=978-7-5479-2884-4| pages=102–105|qq=}}</ref> Its use to denote the fifth of the Ten Heavenly Stems is a case of {{ill|Jiajie|ja|仮借|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiajie|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiajie|1=rebus character|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10888485}} (phonetic loan). * When used in ordinal contexts, Wu represents the 5th position. * Years ending with the digit 8 in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] are designated as Wu years. Another name for the Wu year is "{{ill|Zhuoyong|ja|著雍|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhuoyong|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhuoyong|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}" (also written as "{{ill|著雝|ja|著雝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/著雝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/著雝|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}").<ref>{{Cite web |title=Ancient Alternative Names and Explanations of Heavenly Stems and Earthly Branches |url=https://www.cidianwang.com/shufazuopin/jiaocheng/932596.htm |website=www.cidianwang.com |access-date=2024-03-08|qq=}}</ref> * In {{ill|Chinese chemical nomenclature|ja|化合物命名法|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chinese chemical nomenclature|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chinese chemical nomenclature|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to IUPAC命名法|1=IUPAC nomenclature of chemistry|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q20826683}}, it is used in the names of compounds containing five carbon atoms, such as [[:en:Pentane|Pentane]] and the [[:en:Pentyl group|Pentyl group]]. * Its counterpart is {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} (Mizunoto). * The {{ill|Lucky direction|ja|恵方|3=歳徳神|1=Toshitoku-shin|lt=Lucky direction|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lucky direction|13=User:Immanuelle/Toshitoku-shin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lucky direction|13=User:Immanuelle/Toshitoku-shin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 歳徳神}} associated with Wu is south-southeast, <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:Muô (tiĕng-găng)]][[sn:commons:Category:戊 (Heavenly Stem)]][[fr:Wu (tige céleste)]][[gan:戊]][[hak:Vú (thiên-kôn)]][[ja:戊]][[ko:무 (천간)]][[vi:Mậu (Thiên can)]][[za:Fouh (diengan)]][[zh-min-nan:Bō͘ (Thian-kan)]][[zh-yue:戊]][[zh:戊]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1078409]] Wikidata name: wù [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:04, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Ten Heavenly Stems and Earthly Branches}} '''Tsuchinoe''' (戊,) is the 5th of the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]. <ref>https://www.bing.com/ck/a?!&&p=a602092fc003df5c0e16c71ef5b5a2fa1b5c015d65d986c106e397da1aa7e8afJmltdHM9MTc0MzAzMzYwMA&ptn=3&ver=2&hsh=4&fclid=3e6f989f-7779-62d7-1cd7-8d247648633d&psq=Tsuchinoe+(%e6%88%8a)&u=a1aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGFub3NoaWlqYXBhbmVzZS5jb20vZGljdGlvbmFyeS9lbnRyeV9kZXRhaWxzLmNmbT9lbnRyeV9pZD01NjM0NA&ntb=1</ref><ref>https://www.bing.com/ck/a?!&&p=b0de9cef7fbb919ba00edd65e5b6b759ce4515543c9394cfdbaa7bbe5e0c409cJmltdHM9MTc0MzAzMzYwMA&ptn=3&ver=2&hsh=4&fclid=3e6f989f-7779-62d7-1cd7-8d247648633d&psq=Tsuchinoe+(%e6%88%8a)&u=a1aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubmlob25nb21hc3Rlci5jb20vamFwYW5lc2UvZGljdGlvbmFyeS93b3JkLzU2MTkwL3RzdWNoaW5vZS1iby0lRTYlODglOEEtJUUzJTgxJUE0JUUzJTgxJUExJUUzJTgxJUFFJUUzJTgxJTg4LSVFMyU4MSVCQw&ntb=1</ref><ref>https://www.bing.com/ck/a?!&&p=36c3b523c25f60637ea315b490ada1cd1c95eca16de8466a448a1c65722068a6JmltdHM9MTc0MzAzMzYwMA&ptn=3&ver=2&hsh=4&fclid=3e6f989f-7779-62d7-1cd7-8d247648633d&psq=Tsuchinoe+(%e6%88%8a)&u=a1aHR0cHM6Ly9qbGVhcm4ubmV0L2RpY3Rpb25hcnkvJUU2JTg4JThB&ntb=1</ref>
It is different from the character [https://en.wiktionary.org/wiki/%E6%88%89 戉].
== Pronunciations: 戊 (Stem 5) == * Chinese (Pinyin): Wù * Korean: Mu (무) * Vietnamese: Mậu * Japanese: ** On’yomi: Bo (ぼ) ** Kunyomi (elemental): Tsuchinoe (つちのえ, 土の兄 – “Elder Earth”)
== Overview == * In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|ja|陰陽五行説|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 陰陽五行思想}}, Wu is associated with the yang aspect of the element {{ill|Earth (element)|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (element)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (element)|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In Japan, it is also called "{{ill|Tsuchinoe|ja|つちのえ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}" (Elder Brother of Earth). * In terms of direction, it corresponds to the [[:en:Chūō|Center]]. Regarding time, it refers to around 4 a.m., with the period from 4 a.m. to 6 a.m. known as "{{ill|Boya|ja|戊夜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boya|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boya|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}." * The character "戊" is an {{ill|ideogram|ja|象形文字|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/ideogram|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/ideogram|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=hieroglyph|WD=Q193762}} representing a weapon resembling a battle-axe.<ref>{{Citation| author=Ji Xusheng| year=2014| title=Shuowen Xinzheng| location=Taipei| publisher=Yiwen Press| isbn=978-957-520-168-5| pages=962–93|qq=}}</ref><ref>{{Citation| author=Ge Liang| year=2022| title=Rediscovery of Chinese Characters| location=Shanghai| publisher=Shanghai Calligraphy and Painting Press| isbn=978-7-5479-2884-4| pages=102–105|qq=}}</ref> Its use to denote the fifth of the Ten Heavenly Stems is a case of {{ill|Jiajie|ja|仮借|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiajie|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiajie|1=rebus character|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10888485}} (phonetic loan). * When used in ordinal contexts, Wu represents the 5th position. * Years ending with the digit 8 in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] are designated as Wu years. Another name for the Wu year is "{{ill|Zhuoyong|ja|著雍|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhuoyong|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhuoyong|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}" (also written as "{{ill|著雝|ja|著雝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/著雝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/著雝|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}").<ref>{{Cite web |title=Ancient Alternative Names and Explanations of Heavenly Stems and Earthly Branches |url=https://www.cidianwang.com/shufazuopin/jiaocheng/932596.htm |website=www.cidianwang.com |access-date=2024-03-08|qq=}}</ref> * In {{ill|Chinese chemical nomenclature|ja|化合物命名法|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chinese chemical nomenclature|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chinese chemical nomenclature|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to IUPAC命名法|1=IUPAC nomenclature of chemistry|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q20826683}}, it is used in the names of compounds containing five carbon atoms, such as [[:en:Pentane|Pentane]] and the [[:en:Pentyl group|Pentyl group]]. * Its counterpart is {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} (Mizunoto). * The {{ill|Lucky direction|ja|恵方|3=歳徳神|1=Toshitoku-shin|lt=Lucky direction|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lucky direction|13=User:Immanuelle/Toshitoku-shin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lucky direction|13=User:Immanuelle/Toshitoku-shin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 歳徳神}} associated with Wu is south-southeast, <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:Muô (tiĕng-găng)]][[sn:commons:Category:戊 (Heavenly Stem)]][[fr:Wu (tige céleste)]][[gan:戊]][[hak:Vú (thiên-kôn)]][[ja:戊]][[ko:무 (천간)]][[vi:Mậu (Thiên can)]][[za:Fouh (diengan)]][[zh-min-nan:Bō͘ (Thian-kan)]][[zh-yue:戊]][[zh:戊]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1078409]] Wikidata name: wù [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:04, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Ten Heavenly Stems and Earthly Branches}} '''Tsuchinoe''' (戊,) is the 5th of the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]. <ref>https://www.bing.com/ck/a?!&&p=a602092fc003df5c0e16c71ef5b5a2fa1b5c015d65d986c106e397da1aa7e8afJmltdHM9MTc0MzAzMzYwMA&ptn=3&ver=2&hsh=4&fclid=3e6f989f-7779-62d7-1cd7-8d247648633d&psq=Tsuchinoe+(%e6%88%8a)&u=a1aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGFub3NoaWlqYXBhbmVzZS5jb20vZGljdGlvbmFyeS9lbnRyeV9kZXRhaWxzLmNmbT9lbnRyeV9pZD01NjM0NA&ntb=1</ref><ref>https://www.bing.com/ck/a?!&&p=b0de9cef7fbb919ba00edd65e5b6b759ce4515543c9394cfdbaa7bbe5e0c409cJmltdHM9MTc0MzAzMzYwMA&ptn=3&ver=2&hsh=4&fclid=3e6f989f-7779-62d7-1cd7-8d247648633d&psq=Tsuchinoe+(%e6%88%8a)&u=a1aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubmlob25nb21hc3Rlci5jb20vamFwYW5lc2UvZGljdGlvbmFyeS93b3JkLzU2MTkwL3RzdWNoaW5vZS1iby0lRTYlODglOEEtJUUzJTgxJUE0JUUzJTgxJUExJUUzJTgxJUFFJUUzJTgxJTg4LSVFMyU4MSVCQw&ntb=1</ref><ref>https://www.bing.com/ck/a?!&&p=36c3b523c25f60637ea315b490ada1cd1c95eca16de8466a448a1c65722068a6JmltdHM9MTc0MzAzMzYwMA&ptn=3&ver=2&hsh=4&fclid=3e6f989f-7779-62d7-1cd7-8d247648633d&psq=Tsuchinoe+(%e6%88%8a)&u=a1aHR0cHM6Ly9qbGVhcm4ubmV0L2RpY3Rpb25hcnkvJUU2JTg4JThB&ntb=1</ref>
It is different from the character [https://en.wiktionary.org/wiki/%E6%88%89 戉].
== Pronunciations: 戊 (Stem 5) == * Chinese (Pinyin): Wù * Korean: Mu (무) * Vietnamese: Mậu * Japanese: ** On’yomi: Bo (ぼ) ** Kunyomi (elemental): Tsuchinoe (つちのえ, 土の兄 – “Elder Earth”)
== Overview == * In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|ja|陰陽五行説|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 陰陽五行思想}}, Wu is associated with the yang aspect of the element {{ill|Earth (element)|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (element)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (element)|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In Japan, it is also called "{{ill|Tsuchinoe|ja|つちのえ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}" (Elder Brother of Earth). * In terms of direction, it corresponds to the [[:en:Chūō|Center]]. Regarding time, it refers to around 4 a.m., with the period from 4 a.m. to 6 a.m. known as "{{ill|Boya|ja|戊夜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boya|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boya|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}." * The character "戊" is an {{ill|ideogram|ja|象形文字|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/ideogram|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/ideogram|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=hieroglyph|WD=Q193762}} representing a weapon resembling a battle-axe.<ref>{{Citation| author=Ji Xusheng| year=2014| title=Shuowen Xinzheng| location=Taipei| publisher=Yiwen Press| isbn=978-957-520-168-5| pages=962–93|qq=}}</ref><ref>{{Citation| author=Ge Liang| year=2022| title=Rediscovery of Chinese Characters| location=Shanghai| publisher=Shanghai Calligraphy and Painting Press| isbn=978-7-5479-2884-4| pages=102–105|qq=}}</ref> Its use to denote the fifth of the Ten Heavenly Stems is a case of {{ill|Jiajie|ja|仮借|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiajie|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiajie|1=rebus character|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10888485}} (phonetic loan). * When used in ordinal contexts, Wu represents the 5th position. * Years ending with the digit 8 in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] are designated as Wu years. Another name for the Wu year is "{{ill|Zhuoyong|ja|著雍|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhuoyong|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhuoyong|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}" (also written as "{{ill|著雝|ja|著雝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/著雝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/著雝|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}").<ref>{{Cite web |title=Ancient Alternative Names and Explanations of Heavenly Stems and Earthly Branches |url=https://www.cidianwang.com/shufazuopin/jiaocheng/932596.htm |website=www.cidianwang.com |access-date=2024-03-08|qq=}}</ref> * In {{ill|Chinese chemical nomenclature|ja|化合物命名法|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chinese chemical nomenclature|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chinese chemical nomenclature|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to IUPAC命名法|1=IUPAC nomenclature of chemistry|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q20826683}}, it is used in the names of compounds containing five carbon atoms, such as [[:en:Pentane|Pentane]] and the [[:en:Pentyl group|Pentyl group]]. * Its counterpart is {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} (Mizunoto). * The {{ill|Lucky direction|ja|恵方|3=歳徳神|1=Toshitoku-shin|lt=Lucky direction|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lucky direction|13=User:Immanuelle/Toshitoku-shin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lucky direction|13=User:Immanuelle/Toshitoku-shin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 歳徳神}} associated with Wu is south-southeast, slightly south (165 degrees). ==Sexagenary cycles containing Tsuchinoe (戊)== {{wiktionary|戊}} {| class="wikitable alternance droite" |{{ill|Yang Earth Dragon|ja|戊辰|1=Yang Earth Dragon|zh|戊辰|1=Yang Earth Dragon|ko|무진|fr|Dragon de terre|de|Erde-Drache|en|Earth Dragon|lt=戊辰 (Yang Earth Dragon)|lt_ko=무진|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Regarding time, it refers to around 4 a.m., with the period from 4 a.m. to 6 a.m. known as "{{ill|Boya|ja|戊夜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boya|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boya|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}." * The character "戊" is an {{ill|ideogram|ja|象形文字|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/ideogram|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/ideogram|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=hieroglyph|WD=Q193762}} representing a weapon resembling a battle-axe.<ref>{{Citation| author=Ji Xusheng| year=2014| title=Shuowen Xinzheng| location=Taipei| publisher=Yiwen Press| isbn=978-957-520-168-5| pages=962–93|qq=}}</ref><ref>{{Citation| author=Ge Liang| year=2022| title=Rediscovery of Chinese Characters| location=Shanghai| publisher=Shanghai Calligraphy and Painting Press| isbn=978-7-5479-2884-4| pages=102–105|qq=}}</ref> Its use to denote the fifth of the Ten Heavenly Stems is a case of {{ill|Jiajie|ja|仮借|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiajie|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiajie|1=rebus character|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10888485}} (phonetic loan). * When used in ordinal contexts, Wu represents the 5th position. * Years ending with the digit 8 in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] are designated as Wu years. Another name for the Wu year is "{{ill|Zhuoyong|ja|著雍|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhuoyong|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhuoyong|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}" (also written as "{{ill|著雝|ja|著雝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/著雝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/著雝|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}").<ref>{{Cite web |title=Ancient Alternative Names and Explanations of Heavenly Stems and Earthly Branches |url=https://www.cidianwang.com/shufazuopin/jiaocheng/932596.htm |website=www.cidianwang.com |access-date=2024-03-08|qq=}}</ref> * In {{ill|Chinese chemical nomenclature|ja|化合物命名法|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chinese chemical nomenclature|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chinese chemical nomenclature|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to IUPAC命名法|1=IUPAC nomenclature of chemistry|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q20826683}}, it is used in the names of compounds containing five carbon atoms, such as [[:en:Pentane|Pentane]] and the [[:en:Pentyl group|Pentyl group]]. * Its counterpart is {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} (Mizunoto). * The {{ill|Lucky direction|ja|恵方|3=歳徳神|1=Toshitoku-shin|lt=Lucky direction|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lucky direction|13=User:Immanuelle/Toshitoku-shin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lucky direction|13=User:Immanuelle/Toshitoku-shin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 歳徳神}} associated with Wu is south-southeast, <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:Muô (tiĕng-găng)]][[sn:commons:Category:戊 (Heavenly Stem)]][[fr:Wu (tige céleste)]][[gan:戊]][[hak:Vú (thiên-kôn)]][[ja:戊]][[ko:무 (천간)]][[vi:Mậu (Thiên can)]][[za:Fouh (diengan)]][[zh-min-nan:Bō͘ (Thian-kan)]][[zh-yue:戊]][[zh:戊]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1078409]] Wikidata name: wù [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:04, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Ten Heavenly Stems and Earthly Branches}} '''Tsuchinoe''' (戊,) is the 5th of the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]. <ref>https://www.bing.com/ck/a?!&&p=a602092fc003df5c0e16c71ef5b5a2fa1b5c015d65d986c106e397da1aa7e8afJmltdHM9MTc0MzAzMzYwMA&ptn=3&ver=2&hsh=4&fclid=3e6f989f-7779-62d7-1cd7-8d247648633d&psq=Tsuchinoe+(%e6%88%8a)&u=a1aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGFub3NoaWlqYXBhbmVzZS5jb20vZGljdGlvbmFyeS9lbnRyeV9kZXRhaWxzLmNmbT9lbnRyeV9pZD01NjM0NA&ntb=1</ref><ref>https://www.bing.com/ck/a?!&&p=b0de9cef7fbb919ba00edd65e5b6b759ce4515543c9394cfdbaa7bbe5e0c409cJmltdHM9MTc0MzAzMzYwMA&ptn=3&ver=2&hsh=4&fclid=3e6f989f-7779-62d7-1cd7-8d247648633d&psq=Tsuchinoe+(%e6%88%8a)&u=a1aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubmlob25nb21hc3Rlci5jb20vamFwYW5lc2UvZGljdGlvbmFyeS93b3JkLzU2MTkwL3RzdWNoaW5vZS1iby0lRTYlODglOEEtJUUzJTgxJUE0JUUzJTgxJUExJUUzJTgxJUFFJUUzJTgxJTg4LSVFMyU4MSVCQw&ntb=1</ref><ref>https://www.bing.com/ck/a?!&&p=36c3b523c25f60637ea315b490ada1cd1c95eca16de8466a448a1c65722068a6JmltdHM9MTc0MzAzMzYwMA&ptn=3&ver=2&hsh=4&fclid=3e6f989f-7779-62d7-1cd7-8d247648633d&psq=Tsuchinoe+(%e6%88%8a)&u=a1aHR0cHM6Ly9qbGVhcm4ubmV0L2RpY3Rpb25hcnkvJUU2JTg4JThB&ntb=1</ref>
It is different from the character [https://en.wiktionary.org/wiki/%E6%88%89 戉].
== Pronunciations: 戊 (Stem 5) == * Chinese (Pinyin): Wù * Korean: Mu (무) * Vietnamese: Mậu * Japanese: ** On’yomi: Bo (ぼ) ** Kunyomi (elemental): Tsuchinoe (つちのえ, 土の兄 – “Elder Earth”)

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:Muô (tiĕng-găng)]][[sn:commons:Category:戊 (Heavenly Stem)]][[fr:Wu (tige céleste)]][[gan:戊]][[hak:Vú (thiên-kôn)]][[ja:戊]][[ko:무 (천간)]][[vi:Mậu (Thiên can)]][[za:Fouh (diengan)]][[zh-min-nan:Bō͘ (Thian-kan)]][[zh-yue:戊]][[zh:戊]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1078409]] Wikidata name: wù [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:04, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Ten Heavenly Stems and Earthly Branches}} '''Tsuchinoe''' (戊,) is the 5th of the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]. <ref>https://www.bing.com/ck/a?!&&p=a602092fc003df5c0e16c71ef5b5a2fa1b5c015d65d986c106e397da1aa7e8afJmltdHM9MTc0MzAzMzYwMA&ptn=3&ver=2&hsh=4&fclid=3e6f989f-7779-62d7-1cd7-8d247648633d&psq=Tsuchinoe+(%e6%88%8a)&u=a1aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGFub3NoaWlqYXBhbmVzZS5jb20vZGljdGlvbmFyeS9lbnRyeV9kZXRhaWxzLmNmbT9lbnRyeV9pZD01NjM0NA&ntb=1</ref><ref>https://www.bing.com/ck/a?!&&p=b0de9cef7fbb919ba00edd65e5b6b759ce4515543c9394cfdbaa7bbe5e0c409cJmltdHM9MTc0MzAzMzYwMA&ptn=3&ver=2&hsh=4&fclid=3e6f989f-7779-62d7-1cd7-8d247648633d&psq=Tsuchinoe+(%e6%88%8a)&u=a1aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubmlob25nb21hc3Rlci5jb20vamFwYW5lc2UvZGljdGlvbmFyeS93b3JkLzU2MTkwL3RzdWNoaW5vZS1iby0lRTYlODglOEEtJUUzJTgxJUE0JUUzJTgxJUExJUUzJTgxJUFFJUUzJTgxJTg4LSVFMyU4MSVCQw&ntb=1</ref><ref>https://www.bing.com/ck/a?!&&p=36c3b523c25f60637ea315b490ada1cd1c95eca16de8466a448a1c65722068a6JmltdHM9MTc0MzAzMzYwMA&ptn=3&ver=2&hsh=4&fclid=3e6f989f-7779-62d7-1cd7-8d247648633d&psq=Tsuchinoe+(%e6%88%8a)&u=a1aHR0cHM6Ly9qbGVhcm4ubmV0L2RpY3Rpb25hcnkvJUU2JTg4JThB&ntb=1</ref>
It is different from the character [https://en.wiktionary.org/wiki/%E6%88%89 戉].
== Pronunciations: 戊 (Stem 5) == * Chinese (Pinyin): Wù * Korean: Mu (무) * Vietnamese: Mậu * Japanese: ** On’yomi: Bo (ぼ) ** Kunyomi (elemental): Tsuchinoe (つちのえ, 土の兄 – “Elder Earth”)
== Overview == * In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|ja|陰陽五行説|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 陰陽五行思想}}, Wu is associated with the yang aspect of the element {{ill|Earth (element)|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (element)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (element)|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In Japan, it is also called "{{ill|Tsuchinoe|ja|つちのえ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}" (Elder Brother of Earth). * In terms of direction, it corresponds to the [[:en:Chūō|Center]]. Regarding time, it refers to around 4 a.m., with the period from 4 a.m. to 6 a.m. known as "{{ill|Boya|ja|戊夜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boya|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boya|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}." * The character "戊" is an {{ill|ideogram|ja|象形文字|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/ideogram|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/ideogram|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=hieroglyph|WD=Q193762}} representing a weapon resembling a battle-axe.<ref>{{Citation| author=Ji Xusheng| year=2014| title=Shuowen Xinzheng| location=Taipei| publisher=Yiwen Press| isbn=978-957-520-168-5| pages=962–93|qq=}}</ref><ref>{{Citation| author=Ge Liang| year=2022| title=Rediscovery of Chinese Characters| location=Shanghai| publisher=Shanghai Calligraphy and Painting Press| isbn=978-7-5479-2884-4| pages=102–105|qq=}}</ref> Its use to denote the fifth of the Ten Heavenly Stems is a case of {{ill|Jiajie|ja|仮借|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiajie|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiajie|1=rebus character|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10888485}} (phonetic loan). * When used in ordinal contexts, Wu represents the 5th position. * Years ending with the digit 8 in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] are designated as Wu years. Another name for the Wu year is "{{ill|Zhuoyong|ja|著雍|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhuoyong|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhuoyong|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}" (also written as "{{ill|著雝|ja|著雝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/著雝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/著雝|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}").<ref>{{Cite web |title=Ancient Alternative Names and Explanations of Heavenly Stems and Earthly Branches |url=https://www.cidianwang.com/shufazuopin/jiaocheng/932596.htm |website=www.cidianwang.com |access-date=2024-03-08|qq=}}</ref> * In {{ill|Chinese chemical nomenclature|ja|化合物命名法|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chinese chemical nomenclature|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chinese chemical nomenclature|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to IUPAC命名法|1=IUPAC nomenclature of chemistry|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q20826683}}, it is used in the names of compounds containing five carbon atoms, such as [[:en:Pentane|Pentane]] and the [[:en:Pentyl group|Pentyl group]]. * Its counterpart is {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} (Mizunoto). * The {{ill|Lucky direction|ja|恵方|3=歳徳神|1=Toshitoku-shin|lt=Lucky direction|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lucky direction|13=User:Immanuelle/Toshitoku-shin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lucky direction|13=User:Immanuelle/Toshitoku-shin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 歳徳神}} associated with Wu is south-southeast, slightly south (165 degrees). ==Sexagenary cycles containing Tsuchinoe (戊)== {{wiktionary|戊}} {| class="wikitable alternance droite" |{{ill|Yang Earth Dragon|ja|戊辰|1=Yang Earth Dragon|zh|戊辰|1=Yang Earth Dragon|ko|무진|fr|Dragon de terre|de|Erde-Drache|en|Earth Dragon|lt=戊辰 (Yang Earth Dragon)|lt_ko=무진|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dragon|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} |- style="text-align:left;font-size:100%" |{{ill|Yang Earth Tiger|ja|1=Yang Earth Tiger|2=ja|戊寅|zh|1=Yang Earth Tiger|2=ja|戊寅|ko|무인|fr|Tigre de terre|de|Erde-Tiger|en|Earth Tiger|lt=戊寅 (Yang Earth Tiger)|lt_ko=무인|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Tiger|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |- style="text-align:left;font-size:100%" |{{ill|Yang Earth Rat|ja|1=Yang Earth Rat|2=ja|戊子|zh|1=Yang Earth Rat|2=ja|戊子|ko|무자|fr|Rat de terre|de|Erde-Ratte|en|Earth Rat|lt=戊子 (Yang Earth Rat)|lt_ko=무자|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Rat|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |- style="text-align:left;font-size:100%" |{{ill|Yang Earth Dog|ja|1=Yang Earth Dog|2=ja|戊戌|zh|1=Yang Earth Dog|2=ja|戊戌|ko|무술 (간지)|fr|Chien de terre|de|Erde-Hund|en|Earth Dog|lt=戊戌 (Yang Earth Dog)|lt_ko=무술|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dog|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dog|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |- style="text-align:left;font-size:100%" |{{ill|Yang Earth Monkey|ja|1=Yang Earth Monkey|2=ja|戊申|zh|1=Yang Earth Monkey|2=ja|戊申|ko|무신|fr|Singe de terre|de|Erde-Affe|en|Earth Monkey|lt=戊申 (Yang Earth Monkey)|lt_ko=무신|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Monkey|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |- style="text-align:left;font-size:100%" |{{ill|Yang Earth Horse|ja|1=Yang Earth Horse|2=ja|戊午|zh|1=Yang Earth Horse|2=ja|戊午|ko|무오|fr|Cheval de terre|de|Erde-Pferd|en|Earth Horse|lt=戊午 (Yang Earth Horse)|lt_ko=무오|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Horse|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Horse|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |} == See Also == * [[:en:Boshin War|Boshin War]] {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

In Japan, it is also called "{{ill|Tsuchinoe|ja|つちのえ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}" (Elder Brother of Earth). * In terms of direction, it corresponds to the [[:en:Chūō|Center]]. Regarding time, it refers to around 4 a.m., with the period from 4 a.m. to 6 a.m. known as "{{ill|Boya|ja|戊夜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boya|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boya|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}." * The character "戊" is an {{ill|ideogram|ja|象形文字|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/ideogram|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/ideogram|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=hieroglyph|WD=Q193762}} representing a weapon resembling a battle-axe.<ref>{{Citation| author=Ji Xusheng| year=2014| title=Shuowen Xinzheng| location=Taipei| publisher=Yiwen Press| isbn=978-957-520-168-5| pages=962–93|qq=}}</ref><ref>{{Citation| author=Ge Liang| year=2022| title=Rediscovery of Chinese Characters| location=Shanghai| publisher=Shanghai Calligraphy and Painting Press| isbn=978-7-5479-2884-4| pages=102–105|qq=}}</ref> Its use to denote the fifth of the Ten Heavenly Stems is a case of {{ill|Jiajie|ja|仮借|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiajie|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiajie|1=rebus character|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10888485}} (phonetic loan). * When used in ordinal contexts, Wu represents the 5th position. * Years ending with the digit 8 in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] are designated as Wu years. Another name for the Wu year is "{{ill|Zhuoyong|ja|著雍|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhuoyong|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhuoyong|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}" (also written as "{{ill|著雝|ja|著雝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/著雝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/著雝|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}").<ref>{{Cite web |title=Ancient Alternative Names and Explanations of Heavenly Stems and Earthly Branches |url=https://www.cidianwang.com/shufazuopin/jiaocheng/932596.htm |website=www.cidianwang.com |access-date=2024-03-08|qq=}}</ref> * In {{ill|Chinese chemical (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} (Mizunoto). * The {{ill|Lucky direction|ja|恵方|3=歳徳神|1=Toshitoku-shin|lt=Lucky direction|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lucky <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:Muô (tiĕng-găng)]][[sn:commons:Category:戊 (Heavenly Stem)]][[fr:Wu (tige céleste)]][[gan:戊]][[hak:Vú (thiên-kôn)]][[ja:戊]][[ko:무 (천간)]][[vi:Mậu (Thiên can)]][[za:Fouh (diengan)]][[zh-min-nan:Bō͘ (Thian-kan)]][[zh-yue:戊]][[zh:戊]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1078409]] Wikidata name: wù [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:04, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Ten Heavenly Stems and Earthly Branches}} '''Tsuchinoe''' (戊,) is the 5th of the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]. <ref>https://www.bing.com/ck/a?!&&p=a602092fc003df5c0e16c71ef5b5a2fa1b5c015d65d986c106e397da1aa7e8afJmltdHM9MTc0MzAzMzYwMA&ptn=3&ver=2&hsh=4&fclid=3e6f989f-7779-62d7-1cd7-8d247648633d&psq=Tsuchinoe+(%e6%88%8a)&u=a1aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGFub3NoaWlqYXBhbmVzZS5jb20vZGljdGlvbmFyeS9lbnRyeV9kZXRhaWxzLmNmbT9lbnRyeV9pZD01NjM0NA&ntb=1</ref><ref>https://www.bing.com/ck/a?!&&p=b0de9cef7fbb919ba00edd65e5b6b759ce4515543c9394cfdbaa7bbe5e0c409cJmltdHM9MTc0MzAzMzYwMA&ptn=3&ver=2&hsh=4&fclid=3e6f989f-7779-62d7-1cd7-8d247648633d&psq=Tsuchinoe+(%e6%88%8a)&u=a1aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubmlob25nb21hc3Rlci5jb20vamFwYW5lc2UvZGljdGlvbmFyeS93b3JkLzU2MTkwL3RzdWNoaW5vZS1iby0lRTYlODglOEEtJUUzJTgxJUE0JUUzJTgxJUExJUUzJTgxJUFFJUUzJTgxJTg4LSVFMyU4MSVCQw&ntb=1</ref><ref>https://www.bing.com/ck/a?!&&p=36c3b523c25f60637ea315b490ada1cd1c95eca16de8466a448a1c65722068a6JmltdHM9MTc0MzAzMzYwMA&ptn=3&ver=2&hsh=4&fclid=3e6f989f-7779-62d7-1cd7-8d247648633d&psq=Tsuchinoe+(%e6%88%8a)&u=a1aHR0cHM6Ly9qbGVhcm4ubmV0L2RpY3Rpb25hcnkvJUU2JTg4JThB&ntb=1</ref>
It is different from the character [https://en.wiktionary.org/wiki/%E6%88%89 戉].
== Pronunciations: 戊 (Stem 5) == * Chinese (Pinyin): Wù * Korean: Mu (무) * Vietnamese: Mậu * Japanese: ** On’yomi: Bo (ぼ) ** Kunyomi (elemental): Tsuchinoe (つちのえ, 土の兄 – “Elder Earth”)

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:Muô (tiĕng-găng)]][[sn:commons:Category:戊 (Heavenly Stem)]][[fr:Wu (tige céleste)]][[gan:戊]][[hak:Vú (thiên-kôn)]][[ja:戊]][[ko:무 (천간)]][[vi:Mậu (Thiên can)]][[za:Fouh (diengan)]][[zh-min-nan:Bō͘ (Thian-kan)]][[zh-yue:戊]][[zh:戊]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1078409]] Wikidata name: wù [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:04, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Ten Heavenly Stems and Earthly Branches}} '''Tsuchinoe''' (戊,) is the 5th of the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]. <ref>https://www.bing.com/ck/a?!&&p=a602092fc003df5c0e16c71ef5b5a2fa1b5c015d65d986c106e397da1aa7e8afJmltdHM9MTc0MzAzMzYwMA&ptn=3&ver=2&hsh=4&fclid=3e6f989f-7779-62d7-1cd7-8d247648633d&psq=Tsuchinoe+(%e6%88%8a)&u=a1aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGFub3NoaWlqYXBhbmVzZS5jb20vZGljdGlvbmFyeS9lbnRyeV9kZXRhaWxzLmNmbT9lbnRyeV9pZD01NjM0NA&ntb=1</ref><ref>https://www.bing.com/ck/a?!&&p=b0de9cef7fbb919ba00edd65e5b6b759ce4515543c9394cfdbaa7bbe5e0c409cJmltdHM9MTc0MzAzMzYwMA&ptn=3&ver=2&hsh=4&fclid=3e6f989f-7779-62d7-1cd7-8d247648633d&psq=Tsuchinoe+(%e6%88%8a)&u=a1aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubmlob25nb21hc3Rlci5jb20vamFwYW5lc2UvZGljdGlvbmFyeS93b3JkLzU2MTkwL3RzdWNoaW5vZS1iby0lRTYlODglOEEtJUUzJTgxJUE0JUUzJTgxJUExJUUzJTgxJUFFJUUzJTgxJTg4LSVFMyU4MSVCQw&ntb=1</ref><ref>https://www.bing.com/ck/a?!&&p=36c3b523c25f60637ea315b490ada1cd1c95eca16de8466a448a1c65722068a6JmltdHM9MTc0MzAzMzYwMA&ptn=3&ver=2&hsh=4&fclid=3e6f989f-7779-62d7-1cd7-8d247648633d&psq=Tsuchinoe+(%e6%88%8a)&u=a1aHR0cHM6Ly9qbGVhcm4ubmV0L2RpY3Rpb25hcnkvJUU2JTg4JThB&ntb=1</ref>
It is different from the character [https://en.wiktionary.org/wiki/%E6%88%89 戉].
== Pronunciations: 戊 (Stem 5) == * Chinese (Pinyin): Wù * Korean: Mu (무) * Vietnamese: Mậu * Japanese: ** On’yomi: Bo (ぼ) ** Kunyomi (elemental): Tsuchinoe (つちのえ, 土の兄 – “Elder Earth”)
== Overview == * In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|ja|陰陽五行説|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 陰陽五行思想}}, Wu is associated with the yang aspect of the element {{ill|Earth (element)|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (element)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (element)|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In Japan, it is also called "{{ill|Tsuchinoe|ja|つちのえ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}" (Elder Brother of Earth). * In terms of direction, it corresponds to the [[:en:Chūō|Center]]. Regarding time, it refers to around 4 a.m., with the period from 4 a.m. to 6 a.m. known as "{{ill|Boya|ja|戊夜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boya|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boya|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}." * The character "戊" is an {{ill|ideogram|ja|象形文字|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/ideogram|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/ideogram|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=hieroglyph|WD=Q193762}} representing a weapon resembling a battle-axe.<ref>{{Citation| author=Ji Xusheng| year=2014| title=Shuowen Xinzheng| location=Taipei| publisher=Yiwen Press| isbn=978-957-520-168-5| pages=962–93|qq=}}</ref><ref>{{Citation| author=Ge Liang| year=2022| title=Rediscovery of Chinese Characters| location=Shanghai| publisher=Shanghai Calligraphy and Painting Press| isbn=978-7-5479-2884-4| pages=102–105|qq=}}</ref> Its use to denote the fifth of the Ten Heavenly Stems is a case of {{ill|Jiajie|ja|仮借|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiajie|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiajie|1=rebus character|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10888485}} (phonetic loan). * When used in ordinal contexts, Wu represents the 5th position. * Years ending with the digit 8 in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] are designated as Wu years. Another name for the Wu year is "{{ill|Zhuoyong|ja|著雍|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhuoyong|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhuoyong|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}" (also written as "{{ill|著雝|ja|著雝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/著雝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/著雝|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}").<ref>{{Cite web |title=Ancient Alternative Names and Explanations of Heavenly Stems and Earthly Branches |url=https://www.cidianwang.com/shufazuopin/jiaocheng/932596.htm |website=www.cidianwang.com |access-date=2024-03-08|qq=}}</ref> * In {{ill|Chinese chemical nomenclature|ja|化合物命名法|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chinese chemical nomenclature|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chinese chemical nomenclature|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to IUPAC命名法|1=IUPAC nomenclature of chemistry|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q20826683}}, it is used in the names of compounds containing five carbon atoms, such as [[:en:Pentane|Pentane]] and the [[:en:Pentyl group|Pentyl group]]. * Its counterpart is {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} (Mizunoto). * The {{ill|Lucky direction|ja|恵方|3=歳徳神|1=Toshitoku-shin|lt=Lucky direction|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lucky direction|13=User:Immanuelle/Toshitoku-shin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lucky direction|13=User:Immanuelle/Toshitoku-shin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 歳徳神}} associated with Wu is south-southeast, slightly south (165 degrees). ==Sexagenary cycles containing Tsuchinoe (戊)== {{wiktionary|戊}} {| class="wikitable alternance droite" |{{ill|Yang Earth Dragon|ja|戊辰|1=Yang Earth Dragon|zh|戊辰|1=Yang Earth Dragon|ko|무진|fr|Dragon de terre|de|Erde-Drache|en|Earth Dragon|lt=戊辰 (Yang Earth Dragon)|lt_ko=무진|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dragon|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} |- style="text-align:left;font-size:100%" |{{ill|Yang Earth Tiger|ja|1=Yang Earth Tiger|2=ja|戊寅|zh|1=Yang Earth Tiger|2=ja|戊寅|ko|무인|fr|Tigre de terre|de|Erde-Tiger|en|Earth Tiger|lt=戊寅 (Yang Earth Tiger)|lt_ko=무인|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Tiger|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |- style="text-align:left;font-size:100%" |{{ill|Yang Earth Rat|ja|1=Yang Earth Rat|2=ja|戊子|zh|1=Yang Earth In Japan, it is also called "{{ill|Tsuchinoe|ja|つちのえ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}" (Elder Brother of Earth). * In terms of direction, it corresponds to the [[:en:Chūō|Center]]. Regarding time, it refers to around 4 a.m., with the period from 4 a.m. to 6 a.m. known as "{{ill|Boya|ja|戊夜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boya|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boya|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}." * The character "戊" is an {{ill|ideogram|ja|象形文字|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/ideogram|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/ideogram|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=hieroglyph|WD=Q193762}} representing a weapon resembling a battle-axe.<ref>{{Citation| author=Ji Xusheng| year=2014| title=Shuowen Xinzheng| location=Taipei| publisher=Yiwen Press| isbn=978-957-520-168-5| pages=962–93|qq=}}</ref><ref>{{Citation| author=Ge Liang| year=2022| title=Rediscovery of Chinese Characters| location=Shanghai| publisher=Shanghai Calligraphy and Painting Press| isbn=978-7-5479-2884-4| pages=102–105|qq=}}</ref> Its use to denote the fifth of the Ten Heavenly Stems is a case of {{ill|Jiajie|ja|仮借|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiajie|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiajie|1=rebus character|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10888485}} (phonetic loan). * When used in ordinal contexts, Wu represents the 5th position. * Years ending with the digit 8 in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] are designated as Wu years. Another name for the Wu year is "{{ill|Zhuoyong|ja|著雍|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhuoyong|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhuoyong|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}" (also written as "{{ill|著雝|ja|著雝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/著雝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/著雝|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}").<ref>{{Cite web |title=Ancient Alternative Names and Explanations of Heavenly Stems and Earthly Branches |url=https://www.cidianwang.com/shufazuopin/jiaocheng/932596.htm |website=www.cidianwang.com |access-date=2024-03-08|qq=}}</ref> * In {{ill|Chinese chemical Heavenly Stems and Earthly Branches}} '''Tsuchinoe''' (戊,) is the 5th of the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]. <ref>https://www.bing.com/ck/a?!&&p=a602092fc003df5c0e16c71ef5b5a2fa1b5c015d65d986c106e397da1aa7e8afJmltdHM9MTc0MzAzMzYwMA&ptn=3&ver=2&hsh=4&fclid=3e6f989f-7779-62d7-1cd7-8d247648633d&psq=Tsuchinoe+(%e6%88%8a)&u=a1aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGFub3NoaWlqYXBhbmVzZS5jb20vZGljdGlvbmFyeS9lbnRyeV9kZXRhaWxzLmNmbT9lbnRyeV9pZD01NjM0NA&ntb=1</ref><ref>https://www.bing.com/ck/a?!&&p=b0de9cef7fbb919ba00edd65e5b6b759ce4515543c9394cfdbaa7bbe5e0c409cJmltdHM9MTc0MzAzMzYwMA&ptn=3&ver=2&hsh=4&fclid=3e6f989f-7779-62d7-1cd7-8d247648633d&psq=Tsuchinoe+(%e6%88%8a)&u=a1aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubmlob25nb21hc3Rlci5jb20vamFwYW5lc2UvZGljdGlvbmFyeS93b3JkLzU2MTkwL3RzdWNoaW5vZS1iby0lRTYlODglOEEtJUUzJTgxJUE0JUUzJTgxJUExJUUzJTgxJUFFJUUzJTgxJTg4LSVFMyU4MSVCQw&ntb=1</ref><ref>https://www.bing.com/ck/a?!&&p=36c3b523c25f60637ea315b490ada1cd1c95eca16de8466a448a1c65722068a6JmltdHM9MTc0MzAzMzYwMA&ptn=3&ver=2&hsh=4&fclid=3e6f989f-7779-62d7-1cd7-8d247648633d&psq=Tsuchinoe+(%e6%88%8a)&u=a1aHR0cHM6Ly9qbGVhcm4ubmV0L2RpY3Rpb25hcnkvJUU2JTg4JThB&ntb=1</ref>
It is different from the character [https://en.wiktionary.org/wiki/%E6%88%89 戉].
== Pronunciations: 戊 (Stem 5) == * Chinese (Pinyin): Wù * Korean: Mu (무) * Vietnamese: Mậu * Japanese: ** On’yomi: Bo (ぼ) ** Kunyomi (elemental): Tsuchinoe (つちのえ, 土の兄 – “Elder Earth”)
== Overview == * In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|ja|陰陽五行説|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 陰陽五行思想}}, Wu is associated with the yang aspect of the element {{ill|Earth (element)|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (element)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (element)|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In Japan, it is also called "{{ill|Tsuchinoe|ja|つちのえ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}" (Elder Brother of Earth). * In terms of direction, it corresponds to the [[:en:Chūō|Center]]. Regarding time, it refers to around 4 a.m., with the period from 4 a.m. to 6 a.m. known as "{{ill|Boya|ja|戊夜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boya|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boya|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}." * The character "戊" is an {{ill|ideogram|ja|象形文字|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/ideogram|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/ideogram|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=hieroglyph|WD=Q193762}} representing a weapon resembling a battle-axe.<ref>{{Citation| author=Ji Xusheng| year=2014| title=Shuowen Xinzheng| location=Taipei| publisher=Yiwen Press| isbn=978-957-520-168-5| pages=962–93|qq=}}</ref><ref>{{Citation| author=Ge Liang| year=2022| title=Rediscovery of Chinese Characters| location=Shanghai| publisher=Shanghai Calligraphy and Painting Press| isbn=978-7-5479-2884-4| pages=102–105|qq=}}</ref> Its use to denote the fifth of the Ten Heavenly Stems is a case of {{ill|Jiajie|ja|仮借|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiajie|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiajie|1=rebus character|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10888485}} (phonetic loan). * When used in ordinal contexts, Wu represents the 5th position. * Years ending with the digit 8 in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] are designated as Wu years. Another name for the Wu year is "{{ill|Zhuoyong|ja|著雍|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhuoyong|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhuoyong|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}" (also written as "{{ill|著雝|ja|著雝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/著雝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/著雝|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}").<ref>{{Cite web |title=Ancient Alternative Names and Explanations of Heavenly Stems and Earthly Branches |url=https://www.cidianwang.com/shufazuopin/jiaocheng/932596.htm |website=www.cidianwang.com |access-date=2024-03-08|qq=}}</ref> * In {{ill|Chinese chemical nomenclature|ja|化合物命名法|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chinese chemical nomenclature|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chinese chemical nomenclature|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to IUPAC命名法|1=IUPAC nomenclature of chemistry|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q20826683}}, it is used in the names of compounds containing five carbon atoms, such as [[:en:Pentane|Pentane]] and the [[:en:Pentyl group|Pentyl group]]. * Its counterpart is {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} (Mizunoto). * The {{ill|Lucky direction|ja|恵方|3=歳徳神|1=Toshitoku-shin|lt=Lucky direction|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lucky direction|13=User:Immanuelle/Toshitoku-shin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lucky direction|13=User:Immanuelle/Toshitoku-shin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 歳徳神}} associated with Wu is south-southeast, slightly south (165 degrees). ==Sexagenary cycles containing Tsuchinoe (戊)== {{wiktionary|戊}} {| class="wikitable alternance droite" |{{ill|Yang Earth Dragon|ja|戊辰|1=Yang Earth Dragon|zh|戊辰|1=Yang Earth Dragon|ko|무진|fr|Dragon de terre|de|Erde-Drache|en|Earth Dragon|lt=戊辰 (Yang Earth Dragon)|lt_ko=무진|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dragon|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} |- style="text-align:left;font-size:100%" |{{ill|Yang Earth Tiger|ja|1=Yang Earth Tiger|2=ja|戊寅|zh|1=Yang Earth Tiger|2=ja|戊寅|ko|무인|fr|Tigre de terre|de|Erde-Tiger|en|Earth Tiger|lt=戊寅 (Yang Earth Tiger)|lt_ko=무인|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Tiger|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |- style="text-align:left;font-size:100%" |{{ill|Yang Earth Rat|ja|1=Yang Earth Rat|2=ja|戊子|zh|1=Yang Earth Rat|2=ja|戊子|ko|무자|fr|Rat de terre|de|Erde-Ratte|en|Earth Rat|lt=戊子 (Yang Earth Rat)|lt_ko=무자|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Rat|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |- style="text-align:left;font-size:100%" |{{ill|Yang Earth Dog|ja|1=Yang Earth Dog|2=ja|戊戌|zh|1=Yang Earth Dog|2=ja|戊戌|ko|무술 (간지)|fr|Chien de terre|de|Erde-Hund|en|Earth Dog|lt=戊戌 (Yang Earth Dog)|lt_ko=무술|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dog|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dog|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |- style="text-align:left;font-size:100%" |{{ill|Yang Earth Monkey|ja|1=Yang Earth Monkey|2=ja|戊申|zh|1=Yang Earth Monkey|2=ja|戊申|ko|무신|fr|Singe de <ref>https://www.bing.com/ck/a?!&&p=a602092fc003df5c0e16c71ef5b5a2fa1b5c015d65d986c106e397da1aa7e8afJmltdHM9MTc0MzAzMzYwMA&ptn=3&ver=2&hsh=4&fclid=3e6f989f-7779-62d7-1cd7-8d247648633d&psq=Tsuchinoe+(%e6%88%8a)&u=a1aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGFub3NoaWlqYXBhbmVzZS5jb20vZGljdGlvbmFyeS9lbnRyeV9kZXRhaWxzLmNmbT9lbnRyeV9pZD01NjM0NA&ntb=1</ref><ref>https://www.bing.com/ck/a?!&&p=b0de9cef7fbb919ba00edd65e5b6b759ce4515543c9394cfdbaa7bbe5e0c409cJmltdHM9MTc0MzAzMzYwMA&ptn=3&ver=2&hsh=4&fclid=3e6f989f-7779-62d7-1cd7-8d247648633d&psq=Tsuchinoe+(%e6%88%8a)&u=a1aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubmlob25nb21hc3Rlci5jb20vamFwYW5lc2UvZGljdGlvbmFyeS93b3JkLzU2MTkwL3RzdWNoaW5vZS1iby0lRTYlODglOEEtJUUzJTgxJUE0JUUzJTgxJUExJUUzJTgxJUFFJUUzJTgxJTg4LSVFMyU4MSVCQw&ntb=1</ref><ref>https://www.bing.com/ck/a?!&&p=36c3b523c25f60637ea315b490ada1cd1c95eca16de8466a448a1c65722068a6JmltdHM9MTc0MzAzMzYwMA&ptn=3&ver=2&hsh=4&fclid=3e6f989f-7779-62d7-1cd7-8d247648633d&psq=Tsuchinoe+(%e6%88%8a)&u=a1aHR0cHM6Ly9qbGVhcm4ubmV0L2RpY3Rpb25hcnkvJUU2JTg4JThB&ntb=1</ref>
It is different from the character [https://en.wiktionary.org/wiki/%E6%88%89 戉].
== Pronunciations: 戊 (Stem 5) == * Chinese (Pinyin): Wù * Korean: Mu (무) * Vietnamese: Mậu * Japanese: ** On’yomi: Bo (ぼ) ** Kunyomi (elemental): Tsuchinoe (つちのえ, 土の兄 – “Elder Earth”)
== Overview == * In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|ja|陰陽五行説|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 陰陽五行思想}}, Wu is associated with the yang aspect of the element {{ill|Earth (element)|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (element)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (element)|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In Japan, it is also called "{{ill|Tsuchinoe|ja|つちのえ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}" (Elder Brother of Earth). * In terms of direction, it corresponds to the [[:en:Chūō|Center]]. Regarding time, it refers to around 4 a.m., with the period from 4 a.m. to 6 a.m. known as "{{ill|Boya|ja|戊夜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boya|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boya|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}." * The character "戊" is an {{ill|ideogram|ja|象形文字|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/ideogram|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/ideogram|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=hieroglyph|WD=Q193762}} representing a weapon resembling a battle-axe.<ref>{{Citation| author=Ji Xusheng| year=2014| title=Shuowen Xinzheng| location=Taipei| publisher=Yiwen Press| isbn=978-957-520-168-5| pages=962–93|qq=}}</ref><ref>{{Citation| author=Ge Liang| year=2022| title=Rediscovery of Chinese Characters| location=Shanghai| publisher=Shanghai Calligraphy and Painting Press| isbn=978-7-5479-2884-4| pages=102–105|qq=}}</ref> Its use to denote the fifth of the Ten Heavenly Stems is a case of {{ill|Jiajie|ja|仮借|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiajie|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiajie|1=rebus character|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10888485}} (phonetic loan). * When used in ordinal contexts, Wu represents the 5th position. * Years ending with the digit 8 in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] are designated as Wu years. Another name for the Wu year is "{{ill|Zhuoyong|ja|著雍|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhuoyong|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhuoyong|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}" (also written as "{{ill|著雝|ja|著雝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/著雝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/著雝|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}").<ref>{{Cite web |title=Ancient Alternative Names and Explanations of Heavenly Stems and Earthly Branches |url=https://www.cidianwang.com/shufazuopin/jiaocheng/932596.htm |website=www.cidianwang.com |access-date=2024-03-08|qq=}}</ref> * In {{ill|Chinese chemical nomenclature|ja|化合物命名法|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chinese chemical nomenclature|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chinese chemical nomenclature|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to IUPAC命名法|1=IUPAC nomenclature of chemistry|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q20826683}}, it is used in the names of compounds containing five carbon atoms, such as [[:en:Pentane|Pentane]] and the [[:en:Pentyl group|Pentyl group]]. * Its counterpart is {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} (Mizunoto). * The {{ill|Lucky direction|ja|恵方|3=歳徳神|1=Toshitoku-shin|lt=Lucky direction|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lucky direction|13=User:Immanuelle/Toshitoku-shin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lucky direction|13=User:Immanuelle/Toshitoku-shin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 歳徳神}} associated with Wu is south-southeast, slightly south (165 degrees). ==Sexagenary cycles containing Tsuchinoe (戊)== {{wiktionary|戊}} {| class="wikitable alternance droite" |{{ill|Yang Earth Dragon|ja|戊辰|1=Yang Earth Dragon|zh|戊辰|1=Yang Regarding time, it refers to around 4 a.m., with the period from 4 a.m. to 6 a.m. known as "{{ill|Boya|ja|戊夜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boya|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boya|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}." * The character "戊" is an {{ill|ideogram|ja|象形文字|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/ideogram|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/ideogram|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=hieroglyph|WD=Q193762}} representing a weapon resembling a battle-axe.<ref>{{Citation| author=Ji Xusheng| year=2014| title=Shuowen Xinzheng| location=Taipei| publisher=Yiwen Press| isbn=978-957-520-168-5| pages=962–93|qq=}}</ref><ref>{{Citation| author=Ge Liang| year=2022| title=Rediscovery of Chinese Characters| location=Shanghai| publisher=Shanghai Calligraphy and Painting Press| isbn=978-7-5479-2884-4| pages=102–105|qq=}}</ref> Its use to denote the fifth of the Ten Heavenly Stems is a case of {{ill|Jiajie|ja|仮借|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiajie|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiajie|1=rebus character|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10888485}} (phonetic loan). * When used in ordinal contexts, Wu represents the 5th position. * Years ending with the digit 8 in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] are designated as Wu years. Another name for the Wu year is "{{ill|Zhuoyong|ja|著雍|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhuoyong|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhuoyong|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}" (also written as "{{ill|著雝|ja|著雝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/著雝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/著雝|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}").<ref>{{Cite web |title=Ancient Alternative Names and Explanations of Heavenly Stems and Earthly Branches |url=https://www.cidianwang.com/shufazuopin/jiaocheng/932596.htm |website=www.cidianwang.com |access-date=2024-03-08|qq=}}</ref> * In {{ill|Chinese chemical nomenclature|ja|化合物命名法|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chinese chemical nomenclature|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chinese chemical nomenclature|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to IUPAC命名法|1=IUPAC nomenclature of chemistry|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q20826683}}, it is used in the names of compounds containing five carbon atoms, such as [[:en:Pentane|Pentane]] and the [[:en:Pentyl group|Pentyl group]]. * Its counterpart is {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} (Mizunoto). * The {{ill|Lucky direction|ja|恵方|3=歳徳神|1=Toshitoku-shin|lt=Lucky direction|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lucky direction|13=User:Immanuelle/Toshitoku-shin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lucky direction|13=User:Immanuelle/Toshitoku-shin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 歳徳神}} associated with Wu is south-southeast, It is different from the character [https://en.wiktionary.org/wiki/%E6%88%89 戉].
== Pronunciations: 戊 (Stem 5) == * Chinese (Pinyin): Wù * Korean: Mu (무) * Vietnamese: Mậu * Japanese: ** On’yomi: Bo (ぼ) ** Kunyomi (elemental): Tsuchinoe (つちのえ, 土の兄 – “Elder Earth”)

Heavenly Stems and Earthly Branches}} '''Tsuchinoe''' (戊,) is the 5th of the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]. <ref>https://www.bing.com/ck/a?!&&p=a602092fc003df5c0e16c71ef5b5a2fa1b5c015d65d986c106e397da1aa7e8afJmltdHM9MTc0MzAzMzYwMA&ptn=3&ver=2&hsh=4&fclid=3e6f989f-7779-62d7-1cd7-8d247648633d&psq=Tsuchinoe+(%e6%88%8a)&u=a1aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGFub3NoaWlqYXBhbmVzZS5jb20vZGljdGlvbmFyeS9lbnRyeV9kZXRhaWxzLmNmbT9lbnRyeV9pZD01NjM0NA&ntb=1</ref><ref>https://www.bing.com/ck/a?!&&p=b0de9cef7fbb919ba00edd65e5b6b759ce4515543c9394cfdbaa7bbe5e0c409cJmltdHM9MTc0MzAzMzYwMA&ptn=3&ver=2&hsh=4&fclid=3e6f989f-7779-62d7-1cd7-8d247648633d&psq=Tsuchinoe+(%e6%88%8a)&u=a1aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubmlob25nb21hc3Rlci5jb20vamFwYW5lc2UvZGljdGlvbmFyeS93b3JkLzU2MTkwL3RzdWNoaW5vZS1iby0lRTYlODglOEEtJUUzJTgxJUE0JUUzJTgxJUExJUUzJTgxJUFFJUUzJTgxJTg4LSVFMyU4MSVCQw&ntb=1</ref><ref>https://www.bing.com/ck/a?!&&p=36c3b523c25f60637ea315b490ada1cd1c95eca16de8466a448a1c65722068a6JmltdHM9MTc0MzAzMzYwMA&ptn=3&ver=2&hsh=4&fclid=3e6f989f-7779-62d7-1cd7-8d247648633d&psq=Tsuchinoe+(%e6%88%8a)&u=a1aHR0cHM6Ly9qbGVhcm4ubmV0L2RpY3Rpb25hcnkvJUU2JTg4JThB&ntb=1</ref>
It is different from the character [https://en.wiktionary.org/wiki/%E6%88%89 戉].
== Pronunciations: 戊 (Stem 5) == * Chinese (Pinyin): Wù * Korean: Mu (무) * Vietnamese: Mậu * Japanese: ** On’yomi: Bo (ぼ) ** Kunyomi (elemental): Tsuchinoe (つちのえ, 土の兄 – “Elder Earth”)
== Overview == * In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|ja|陰陽五行説|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 陰陽五行思想}}, Wu is associated with the yang aspect of the element {{ill|Earth (element)|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (element)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (element)|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In Japan, it is also called "{{ill|Tsuchinoe|ja|つちのえ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}" (Elder Brother of Earth). * In terms of direction, it corresponds to the [[:en:Chūō|Center]]. Regarding time, it refers to around 4 a.m., with the period from 4 a.m. to 6 a.m. known as "{{ill|Boya|ja|戊夜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boya|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boya|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}." * The character "戊" is an {{ill|ideogram|ja|象形文字|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/ideogram|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/ideogram|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=hieroglyph|WD=Q193762}} representing a weapon resembling a battle-axe.<ref>{{Citation| author=Ji Xusheng| year=2014| title=Shuowen Xinzheng| location=Taipei| publisher=Yiwen Press| isbn=978-957-520-168-5| pages=962–93|qq=}}</ref><ref>{{Citation| author=Ge Liang| year=2022| title=Rediscovery of Chinese Characters| location=Shanghai| publisher=Shanghai Calligraphy and Painting Press| isbn=978-7-5479-2884-4| pages=102–105|qq=}}</ref> Its use to denote the fifth of the Ten Heavenly Stems is a case of {{ill|Jiajie|ja|仮借|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiajie|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiajie|1=rebus character|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10888485}} (phonetic loan). * When used in ordinal contexts, Wu represents the 5th position. * Years ending with the digit 8 in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] are designated as Wu years. Another name for the Wu year is "{{ill|Zhuoyong|ja|著雍|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhuoyong|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhuoyong|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}" (also written as "{{ill|著雝|ja|著雝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/著雝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/著雝|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}").<ref>{{Cite web |title=Ancient Alternative Names and Explanations of Heavenly Stems and Earthly Branches |url=https://www.cidianwang.com/shufazuopin/jiaocheng/932596.htm |website=www.cidianwang.com |access-date=2024-03-08|qq=}}</ref> * In {{ill|Chinese chemical nomenclature|ja|化合物命名法|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chinese chemical nomenclature|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chinese chemical nomenclature|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to IUPAC命名法|1=IUPAC nomenclature of chemistry|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q20826683}}, it is used in the names of compounds containing five carbon atoms, such as [[:en:Pentane|Pentane]] and the [[:en:Pentyl group|Pentyl group]]. * Its counterpart is {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} (Mizunoto). * The {{ill|Lucky direction|ja|恵方|3=歳徳神|1=Toshitoku-shin|lt=Lucky direction|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lucky direction|13=User:Immanuelle/Toshitoku-shin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lucky direction|13=User:Immanuelle/Toshitoku-shin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 歳徳神}} associated with Wu is south-southeast, In Japan, it is also called "{{ill|Tsuchinoe|ja|つちのえ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}" (Elder Brother of Earth). * In terms of direction, it corresponds to the [[:en:Chūō|Center]]. Regarding time, it refers to around 4 a.m., with the period from 4 a.m. to 6 a.m. known as "{{ill|Boya|ja|戊夜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boya|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boya|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}." * The character "戊" is an {{ill|ideogram|ja|象形文字|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/ideogram|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/ideogram|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=hieroglyph|WD=Q193762}} representing a weapon resembling a battle-axe.<ref>{{Citation| author=Ji Xusheng| year=2014| title=Shuowen Xinzheng| location=Taipei| publisher=Yiwen Press| isbn=978-957-520-168-5| pages=962–93|qq=}}</ref><ref>{{Citation| author=Ge Liang| year=2022| title=Rediscovery of Chinese Characters| location=Shanghai| publisher=Shanghai Calligraphy and Painting Press| isbn=978-7-5479-2884-4| pages=102–105|qq=}}</ref> Its use to denote the fifth of the Ten Heavenly Stems is a case of {{ill|Jiajie|ja|仮借|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiajie|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiajie|1=rebus character|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10888485}} (phonetic loan). * When used in ordinal contexts, Wu represents the 5th position. * Years ending with the digit 8 in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] are designated as Wu years. Another name for the Wu year is "{{ill|Zhuoyong|ja|著雍|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhuoyong|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhuoyong|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}" (also written as "{{ill|著雝|ja|著雝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/著雝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/著雝|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}").<ref>{{Cite web |title=Ancient Alternative Names and Explanations of Heavenly Stems and Earthly Branches |url=https://www.cidianwang.com/shufazuopin/jiaocheng/932596.htm |website=www.cidianwang.com |access-date=2024-03-08|qq=}}</ref> * In {{ill|Chinese chemical nomenclature|ja|化合物命名法|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chinese chemical nomenclature|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chinese chemical nomenclature|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to IUPAC命名法|1=IUPAC nomenclature of chemistry|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q20826683}}, it is used in the names of compounds containing five carbon atoms, such as [[:en:Pentane|Pentane]] and the [[:en:Pentyl group|Pentyl group]]. * Its counterpart is {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} (Mizunoto). * The {{ill|Lucky direction|ja|恵方|3=歳徳神|1=Toshitoku-shin|lt=Lucky direction|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lucky direction|13=User:Immanuelle/Toshitoku-shin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lucky direction|13=User:Immanuelle/Toshitoku-shin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 歳徳神}} associated with Wu is south-southeast, == Pronunciations: 戊 (Stem 5) == * Chinese (Pinyin): Wù * Korean: Mu (무) * Vietnamese: Mậu * Japanese: ** On’yomi: Bo (ぼ) ** Kunyomi (elemental): Tsuchinoe (つちのえ, 土の兄 – “Elder Earth”)
